EXPERIENTIAL LEARNING. FANTABULOUS CAMPUS. Sri Eshwar is the most preferred institution for high ranking students. With industry-relevant curriculum, project based learning, high energy faculty, corporate-like facilities, best amenities and vibrant activities, Sri Eshwar is the most sought after institution for high quality and holistic education. What’s more? We are proud to emerge, every year, as a TOP PLACEMENTS COLLEGE! WITH UNIVERSITIES AROUND THE WORLD ACADEMICS @ SRI ESHWAR Industry-relevant course content and skill based learning methods form the crux of our programme offerings. We extensively engage industry professionals to empower our faculty and students and help them stay updated. We also constantly update our curriculum and stay agile to suit the changing needs of industries. Our goal is to ensure that students are industry-ready in all aspects for their BRIGHT CAREERS . Bokep JAV Sub Indo GOJAV Sub Indo VegaMovies UG PROGRAMMES PG PROGRAMMES DOCTORATE PROGRAMMES UG PROGRAMMES ENGINEERING B.E.Computer Science and Engineering B.E.Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) B.E.Computer and Communication Engineering B.E.Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) B.E.Electronics and Communication Engineering B.E.Electrical and Electronics Engineering B.E.Mechanical Engineering TECHNOLOGY B.Tech.Artificial Intelligence and Data Science B.Tech.Computer Science and Business Systems B.Tech.Information Technology PG PROGRAMMES ENGINEERING M.E.Computer Science and Engineering M.E.Engineering Design M.E.VLSI Design DOCTORATE PROGRAMMES Anna University Approved Research Institute Ph.D. Programmes are offered across all Engineering, Technology, Science & Humanities disciplines. ADMISSIONS WORLDCLASS FACILITIES At Sri Eshwar, we go to great lengths to make sure we provide the best infrastructure and facilities for our students. With the right ambience, we can bring out the best potential hidden inside every student. We give the best facilities and ambience to students and expect the best performance from them, in return! Collab Space Collab Space, a space where students work in teams, collaborate to build products, gear up for upcoming hackathons and work on interesting projects. Collab Space provides the right ambience for students to get into the corporate groove. MakerSpace MakerSpace is a state-of the art facility specially designed to promote interdepartmental, multidisciplinary collaboration among students. This space provides exceptional facilities, training and mentorship to turn their ideas into successful products.The students are also groomed here to compete in national and international level contests. Interactive Classrooms To stay in-line with the skill-based teaching methods, our classrooms are equipped with smart and interactive boards to bring a wide variety of learning possibilities to students. Throughout the lectures, students stay connected to their laptops, to experiment and try out the problems being taught. Our classrooms are truly an engaging and interactive experience for students. IT Centre IT Centre was built  to provide students with an ultimate experience of an IT company. The IT Centre houses a 200 seater auditorium, Centres of Excellence with Virtusa, Aspire Systems, NTT Data etc and Extended Development Centres. Students are rigorously trained and prepared for placements here.Through the Centres of Excellence, the recruited students are given company specific training, so that they can be readily deployed into projects when they join the company. Innovative Learning Spaces Throughout the campus, you will find that Sri Eshwar is willing to go the extra mile to create the right ambience for learning. Students can learn well, when the environment is casual, supportive and comfortable. Our learning spaces are designed by keeping in mind the student’s comfort while they learn together in teams. Centre of Excellence Our Centres of Excellence promote multi-disciplinary learning which brings a confluence of ideas and new innovations to the forefront. Uniquely designed spaces, inspires students to work on their projects with a free and happy mind, and extracts their best capability. Placement Training Facility As a top placements college, we pride ourselves in providing exclusive placement training facilities. With more than four 200+ seating capacity facilities, four 60+ seating capacity training rooms, we can accommodate about 1000 students to undergo dedicated hands-on placement training at a time. With such exclusive training facilities paired with industry mentorship and high quality students, Sri Eshwar continues to top in placements every year in Tamil Nadu!. Synapse Studio Synapse Studio, an IT auditorium provides students with a hands-on learning experience. Industry experts and senior professionals utilize this space to conduct highly engaging hands-on sessions. dents to get into the corporate groove. Centre for International Relations Centre for International Relations immerses itself in enabling the exchange of students between Sri Eshwar and universities around the globe.The walls of this Centre is embellished with the pictures of the students and their university details who have already gone abroad and gathered rich and immersive experiences. This highly inspires students and also gives awareness on the possibilities of global education. Centre for Higher Education & Foreign Languages This Centre is used by students who wish to prepare for higher studies. Awareness sessions  on widespread future career options available to students after graduation, are conducted in the first year itself, by experts. Students who aspire for Higher Education, use the Centre to attend Coaching classes for competitive exam preparation. The Centre also conducts foreign language training in German and Japanese. Ignite - Startup Accelerator Ignite serves as a dedicated facility to drive innovation and entrepreneurial spirit into the mind of every Eshwarite. Ignite is a facility dedicated for students who wish to convert their ideas to prototypes and proof of concepts. A well equipped conference room, leader cabins, collaborative workspaces, discussion spaces form a part of the Ignite experience. Ignite, staying true to its name, ignites the spark of innovation in the minds of Eshwarites. Centre for Research Centre for Research has been established at Sri Eshwar with the intent to promote active research work by the faculty and student community for their academic research to publish papers, file patents and work on research projects.The Centre promotes focussed research through its 9 Advanced Research Centres. This Centre prides itself in housing some of the top research scientists of the world. State-of-the-art Labs While labs are an integral part of the learning process, Sri Eshwar goes the extra mile to provide students an innovative lab experience, so that they feel fully equipped and energized to go beyond the books and curriculum and use the labs to experiment their fresh ideas and test their hypothesis. Vista Hall Vista Hall, will be actively utilized for Industry Connect programmes, Leadership talk, Expert guest lectures, seminars and a wide variety of events. Vista Hall is equipped with state-of-the-art audio-visual infrastructure to support highly engaging presentations. Sound Recording Studio A fully equipped recording studio with studio lights and professional sound recording facilities, helps faculty record course content  as an additional effective way of teaching,  Students too walk in to record their presentations, podcasts and other audio bytes for their needs. Sri Eshwar nightingales from the Harmonix club also enjoy recording their songs with professional sound mixers. Amenity Centre Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. Medical Centre A fully functional Medical Centre is equipped to handle any emergency health-related services and comprehensive medical care for students. With a full time doctor and two nurses, latest medical equipment for basic treatment, separate wards for boys and girls, this facility can provide quick medical care for our students. Sports Facilities Sports is an integral part of the Sri Eshwar learning experience. We have dedicated facilities, coaches and equipments for a wide variety sports including, basketball, volleyball, athletics, cricket, hockey, kabbadi etc. With a team of enthusiastic coaches, our talented Eshwarites sports team, wins many awards and accolades in various sports tournaments. Winning is a habit of our Eshwar sports champions! PLACEMENT STORIES Sharing the glorious success of our 2025 batch who are placed in more than 120 top multinational companies. We are so proud of them! 60 L Highest Package 07 Students Placed Above 0 L 20 Students Placed Above 0 L 100 Students Placed Above 0 L 150+ Students Placed Above 0 L 350+ Students Placed Above 0 L 650+ Students Placed Above 0 L 800+ StudentS Placed PLACEMENTS IN 120+ GLOBAL ORGANIZATIONS KNOW MORE EXCELLENT RESEARCH Research is the cornerstone of ground breaking innovations that will change the landscape of the world for the better. At Sri Eshwar, we commit to extensive research and igniting the spark of innovation among our students and faculty members. Sri Eshwar is an extensive research institute! Academic Research sponsored research Advanced Research Centre KNOW MORE INNOVATION ECOSYSTEM New and ingenious ways of solving a problem, having a fresh alternate perspective, implementing ideas that have never been thought of before – such is the culture of our students and faculty at Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation. We sow the seeds of entrepreneurial spirit within Eshwarites and give them the freedom to think and innovate. Creativity and Innovation is in the air! centre for excellence HACKATHONS IGNITE - Startup
Accelerator KNOW MORE INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS YOUR RUNWAY FOR GLOBAL OPPORTUNITIES At the Centre for International Relations, we foster global associations and provide opportunities to students and faculty for international collaboration. Our mission is to create a vibrant environment that promotes academic exchange and rich international exposure for students and faculty members. With global cultural and knowledge exchange, new perspectives are born! 50+ Partnerships with top universities 100+ Global Events organized Intl. Advisory Board from leading overseas universities 1000+ Students trained in foreign languages KNOW MORE ESHWARITES SHINE GLOBALLY Our students actively participate in a wide variety of competitions and challenges conducted at the state, national and international level. We feel proud when our students make a mark in global challenges and hackathons.The will to win, the desire to succeed, and the urge to reach one’s full potential is in the DNA of Eshwarites! Buzzing with lively and vibrant activities, Sri Eshwar is always a fun-filled and happy campus. After a rigorous day of learning, our students have a host of activities to indulge in and engage themselves.Be it their love of music and dance, sweating it out in the sports field, or getting together with peers through club activities, the vibe around the campus is always HAPPY AND UPBEAT! EXPERIENCE THE CAMPUS LIFE CAMPUS TOUR ADMISSIONS HOSTEL CREATING MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME! COZY ROOMS. COMFORTABLE STAY. Well designed airy rooms,  clean and fully equipped kitchens, dining space with multi cuisine food options, facilities like laundry, salon & supermarket, lots of greenery, unique seating spaces for friends to get together and have casual conversations, extended lab facilities for students to work after college hours – forms a part of the Sri Eshwar hostel experience. Extended learning is a big part of hostel life. Our hostel at night, with beautiful lighting and the young energetic vibe of students, is a must-see for all! In a nutshell, Sri Eshwar hostel will provide the  ambience to relax, enjoy a variety of tasty food, and also to collaborate and grow in the company of peers. KNOW MORE FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS What are the programmes offered at Sri Eshwar? Sri Eshwar is an autonomous institution affiliated to Anna University. We offer programmes like B.E and B.Tech in Computer Science, Electronics and Communication, Electrical and Electronics, Mechanical,Information Technology, Computer Science and Business Systems, Computer and Communication, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Cyber Security, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. Is there an active Alumni cell at Sri Eshwar? Yes, Sri Eshwar has an active Alumni cell that conducts activities throughout the year. Our alumni are dedicated in giving back to their alma mater and participate in various college activities as judges and mentors for their juniors. Does college offer Research sponsorships? Yes. College offers seed fund for research projects. Many projects are currently active through college seed fund. Apart from this the Centre for Research and Development also procures funds from government organizations to take up sponsored research projects. Does Sri Eshwar college offer placements? Yes. Sri Eshwar offers stupendous placement record every year in top companies. Our top packages are around 40 Lakhs per annum. Many students get placed at the beginning of third year itself and go for internships at companies. How is the hostel facility at Sri Eshwar? Hostel is like a home away from home. We offer a fully safe, secure and a comfortable hostel experience. With beautiful ambience, airy rooms, attached bathrooms, comfortable beds, individual study space, gym, beauty parlour, super market and a state-of-the-art amenity centre, hostel is a must-experience part of Sri Eshwar . How is the campus life at Sri Eshwar? Sri Eshwar campus is full of positivity. It is a vibrant and happening place for students. Apart from studies students engage in many activities out of their interest, organize events and participate in many competitions in co-curricular and extra curricular. Campus ambience is also beautiful with grass and trees everywhere, along with corporate style offices and spaces for students to work on their projects. PUBLICATIONS 45+ PATENTS PROGRAMME SCOPE Computer Science is a dynamic and fast growing area that has become an integral part of our daily lives. In the new age world, almost everything revolves around information technology and software.While the automation we have seen in the past is far and wide, the automation we are going to witness in the future is going to be still more exciting. LEARNING SCOPE The scope of learning for you in our CSE program will include Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Agile Software Development, Cybersecurity, AR/VR , OOPS Concepts, Computer Architecture, Computer Networks, Database Management System, Software technologies including C, Python for Data Science and Java Full Stack.The department having highly experience and capable faculty who are trained by the Industry, state of the art infrastructure and Industry Powered Nextgen Laboratories in AI-ML, Cloud Technologies,Data Science and Design Thinking. CAREER PROGRESSION The scope of career progression, studying CSE, is abundant and unlimited with leading multinational IT companies recruiting fresh CSE graduates in large numbers, or becoming an entrepreneur, developing your own software products,or pursuing higher studies. The students are prepared to start their career as Software Developers, Data Scientist, System Analyst and Architect ,Network Engineers, Database Administrator , Web developers, AI Engineers etc., VISION To groom students into globally competent software professionals and meet the ever changing requirements of the industry. MISSION Creating a quality academic environment with relevant IT infrastructure and empowering faculty and students with emerging technologies. Motivating staff and students to actively involve in lifelong learning and fostering research. Inculcating leadership and entrepreneurship skills in students. Generating opportunities for students to evolve as competent software professionals with societal consciousness. PROGRAMME DETAILS Programme Educational Objectives PEO1: Graduates will build successful careers in computing and information technology domains by applying strong foundations in engineering principles, computer science fundamentals, and professional best practices. PEO2: Graduates will pursue higher education, research, and entrepreneurial endeavours by demonstrating self-directed and life-long learning capabilities to continuously adapt to emerging technologies, industry trends, and societal needs. PEO3: Graduates will conceive, design and implement innovative, and ethically responsible computing solutions to address real-world challenges in industry and society. Programme Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Programme Specific Outcomes PSO1: Demonstrate knowledge in open source technologies PSO2: Develop innovative solutions by adapting emerging technologies for industry oriented applications PSO3: Implement SDLC principles for project/product development Curriculum & Syllabus CSE-2023 CSE-2019-Revised CSE-2019 Programme Assessment Committee 2024-2025 Board of Studies 2024-2025 2023-2024 2022-2023 2021-2022 2020-2021 2019-2020 Corporate ADVISORY BOARD Naming a few of our advisories working in top companies, who help us align our courses and curriculum to what the industry needs. Anandakumar M.E, Ph.D D.O.J :  04.05.2018 Areas of Specialization Cognitive Radio Networks,Mobile Communications,Wireless Networks Dr.H.Anandakumar has 18 years of experience in Engineering Education. He has received his Master’s in Software engineering from PSG College of Technology, Coimbatore and PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from PSG College of Technology. His research areas include Big Data, Cognitive Radio Networks,Mobile Communications and Networking Protocols. He has authored more than 172 research papers in reputed International Journals and IEEE conferences. He has authored 14 books and many book chapters with reputed publishers such as Springer and IGI. He is a passionate researcher and also Editor in Chief Keai – Elsevier – IJIN, Associate Editor IEEE Access, Area Editor – EAI Energy Web and served as a reviewer for IEEE, IET, Springer, Inderscience and Elsevier journals. He is also the guest editor of many journals with Elsevier, Springer, Inderscience, etc. He had been the General Chair, Session Chair, and Panelist in several conferences. He is a senior member of IEEE, IET, ACM and Fellow member of EAI research group. Dr.V.S.Akshaya M.E., Ph.D.PDF D.O.J :  02.05.2018 Areas of Specialization Business Intelligence,
Data Science Dr. Akshaya, with over 19+ years of distinguished experience in the education management sector, is a luminary in higher education. She holds a Master’s in Computer Science & Engineering from Kumaraguru College of Technology, Coimbatore, and a Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering from Government College of Technology, Anna University, Chennai. Further enhancing her academic repertoire, she completed a PostDoc in Business Intelligence at Unifacvest University, Brazil.She has made significant contributions to her fields of expertise, with numerous publications in esteemed conferences and journals. Her research interests encompass Business Intelligence, Data Science, and Neuroscience. She has co-chaired several prestigious conferences and holds memberships in prominent professional organizations, including IEEE, ACM, and the EAI research group. She has been recognized as Best Notable Alumni of CSE dept @KCT in 2022 .In her current role, she excels in training students in foreign languages such as German and Japanese. Additionally, she adeptly guides students in pursuing Master’s programs both in India and in top international education hubs across multiple continents, fostering academic excellence and global education opportunities for the students. Dr.K.Saravana Kumar M.Tech.,Ph.D D.O.J : 01.06.2019 Areas of Specialization Cloud Computing,Data Analytics,AWS & Python programming Dr. K.Saravanakumar works as an  Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science & Engineering . He had received his Master’s degree and Ph.D degree from Anna University, Chennai. He is having 17 years of teaching experience. His research areas include Cloud Computing, Data Analytics, AWS & Python programming. He has received grants from Government agencies and conducted workshops and conferences. He has published papers in SCOPUS and other reputed journals.  He is a life member of ISTE. Dr.S.Sampath Kumar M.Tech, Ph.D D.O.J : 21.11.2011 Areas of Specialization Theoretical Computation,Deep Learning,
,Enerative AI Dr. S. SAMPATH KUMAR is an accomplished Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) with 16 years of experience. His educational qualifications include a B. Tech (IT) from Kumaraguru College of Technology, M. Tech (IT) from Anna University Coimbatore, and a PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University. He has authored 25 international-level publications including ISTE, IEEE and various Reputed Journals. His work has received 50+ citations. He holds 3 patents. He is DGCA Certified Drone Pilot Instructor. He nurtured innovative ideas, leading to successful student-led startups. He guided student teams to victory in National Level Hackathons, including the SIH Hardware Edition in 2019 and the SIH Software Edition in 2022.  He is aced as Session Chair for various International Conferences. He is a Senior Member of IEEE a lifetime member of ISTE and IAENG He actively contributes as a reviewer for multiple International Journals and has served as a jury member for national-level hackathons, including SIH and Toycathon. His research interests span Deep Learning, Machine Learning, LLM, and Unmanned Aerial Vehicle. His areas of specialization include Deep Learning, ML, LLM, and UAVs. Notably, he has contributed to innovation through   several inhouse projects like the “Face Mask Detector” and “Bill Buddy.” Within the department, he serves as the Department Academic Coordinator and Department NBA Coordinator. Dr.S.K.Harikarthik Ph.D D.O.J : 22.06.2023 Areas of Specialization Software Engineering, Software Testing,Computer Networks Dr.S.K.Harikarthik has 17 years of experience in Engineering Education. He has received his Bachelor’s in Information Technology from Kumaraguru College of Technology, Master’s in Information Technology from Anna University and PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai. His research area includes Software Engineering and Networks. He published research papers in reputed Journals and Conferences. He had been the Session Chair, and Panellist in several conferences. He guided 30+ Undergraduate and Postgraduate Projects for Anna University and Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University students. He is nominated as Program Advisory Committee member for formulating syllabus for the Computer Engineering department of Nachimuthu Polytechnic College, Pollachi.  He is life time member in ISTE and he acted as Nodal officer for Anna University examinations. Dr.S.Yasotha M.E., Ph.D D.O.J :  01.03.2021 Areas of Specialization Wireless Sensor Network,Web Application and Development Dr. S.Yasotha has 14 years of experience in Engineering Education.  She has received her master’s in VLSI Design from Anna University, Coimbatore and PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Government College of Technology, Coimbatore. Her research areas include Wireless Sensor Networks, Computer Networks, Web Application Development. She has published 10 research papers in reputed International Journals and IEEE conferences. She acted as Co-Chair in conferences. She has mentored Students and developed projects for industries. She has a life time membership of ISTE. Dr.M.Suriya Ph.D D.O.J : 23.11.2021 Areas of Specialization Artificial Intelligence, Deep Learning, Machine Learning, Wireles Communication Dr. M. Suriya has completed her Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai, and her M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering from Anna University of Technology, Coimbatore. She has about 13 years of teaching experience, and her areas of interest include Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Deep Learning, Machine Learning, and Wireless Communication. She is an NVIDIA Certified Deep Learning Institute Instructor and Ambassador and a Senior IEEE member. She has organized funded seminars (ISRO Sponsored), workshops, and FDPs, and has delivered guest lectures and workshops on AI, ML, and DL in various reputed institutions. She has authored more than 30 research papers, including publications in high-impact journals like IEEE Access, Elsevier, Hindawi, Springer, and Taylor & Francis. She has authored two books with Springer International Publishing and published about 14 book chapters with reputed publishers. She has obtained three patents, including two patent grants, and has served as a reviewer for more than 15 peer-reviewed journals such as IEEE Access, Wiley, MDPI, Springer Wireless Networks, Inderscience, Taylor & Francis, and MONET. Dr.K.Sureshkumar B.E., M.Tech., Ph.D D.O.J : 04.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Natural Language Processing, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Cloud Computing. Dr. K. Suresh Kumar is an accomplished academician and researcher with over 16 years of teaching experience in the field of Electronics and Communication Engineering and Information Technology . He completed his Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering from St. Xavier’s Catholic College of Engineering under Anna University, with research focused on “Multilingual Aspect Based Sentiment Analysis for Online Reviews using Deep Learning Approaches.” His areas of interest include Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, Internet of Things, Blockchain, Cryptography, and Network Security. He has served in various academic roles, including Assistant Professor, Senior Assistant Professor, and Associate Professor in reputed engineering institutions. He has published numerous research articles in SCI and Scopus indexed journals, contributed book chapters with international publishers, and presented papers at international conferences. He has also received research grants from agencies such as CSIR and ICMR. In addition to his academic contributions, he has undertaken significant administrative responsibilities, guided undergraduate and postgraduate projects, and actively participated in workshops, faculty development programs, and professional bodies like ISTE, IEEE and IAENG. Dr.A.Anandaraj M.E., Ph.D D.O.J : 16.07.201 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning ,Data Analytics,Healthcare Dr. A. Anandaraj has 14 years of experience in engineering education. He holds a B.Tech degree in Information Technology, a Master of Engineering degree in Software Engineering and a Ph.D. from the National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NITT). His research interests include Data Analytics and Machine Learning, with a specific focus on Healthcare Analytics. He is also a reviewer for three refereed journals and the Author of a book on Software Engineering. He is also a lifetime member of ISTE. In addition to his academic achievements, he has actively participated in the academic community by organizing and attending numerous workshops, delivering guest lectures, further showcasing his expertise and commitment to the field. He is the UG Programme Coordinator and Department Academic Coordinator of CSE at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. Dr.Gowtham Chakravarthy M.E., Ph.D D.O.J  :07.02.2022 Areas of Specialization Adhoc Networks, Cloud – Devops ,BigData, AI,Machine Learning,Web Mining Dr. D. Gowtham Chakravarthy received his Master’s in Computer Science and Engineering and PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai. He has over 10 years of teaching experience which includes 5 years of industry experience. His research interests include ad-hoc networks, artificial intelligence, cloud DevOps, machine learning, and web mining. He has published several papers in reputed international journals and conferences and is also a reviewer for 6 international journals and an editor for 4 international journals. He subsequently received two prestigious international research fellowships—JSPS and JST, enabling him to work as a Research Scientist for 3.5 years in two leading Japanese universities. His expertise spans a wide spectrum of emerging technologies, including Generative and Agentic AI, AI Model Compression and Optimization, Cloud of Things (CoT), Cloud-native and Edge Computing Paradigms, Platform Engineering, 6G Communication Techniques, Blockchain, and Quantum-safe Cryptography Algorithms. Dr. Pethuru Raj is a prolific contributor to the technology community. He has authored and edited over 75 books, published more than 60 research papers, and contributed to over 55 book chapters in reputable international publications. His work has significantly influenced modern AI, cloud, and distributed computing practices across industries. Mr.V.Chandran Ph.D., D.O.J :  01.08.2025 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, Predictive Modeling, Pricing Analytics, Incentive Optimization, Attribution Modeling, Customer Analytics, Clinical Image-based Diagnostics Mr. Chandran Venkatesan is a Lead Data Scientist with over 9 years of experience in building and delivering AI-driven solutions across the healthcare, pharma, CPG, and retail industries. He specializes in advanced machine learning, deep learning, generative AI, predictive modeling, and end-to-end model development. He has strong expertise in pricing analytics, incentive optimization, attribution modeling, customer behavior insights, and clinical image-based diagnostic systems. Throughout his career, he has led the development of impactful analytical solutions such as pricing recommendation engines, incentive effectiveness measurement models, multi-touch attribution frameworks, and healthcare engagement models. He is proficient in cutting-edge tools and technologies including XGBoost, SHAP, Dataiku, TensorFlow, and various cloud platforms. He holds a M.E degree in VLSI. He has an outstanding research profile, having authored more than 35 peer-reviewed publications and secured 10 patents in the fields of AI and machine learning. His work has received significant academic visibility with 1200+ citations on Google Scholar. Mr.A.Jeeva M.E., D.O.J : 01.08.2025 Areas of Specialization Front-End Development, UI Engineering, Web Technologies, Responsive Design, Angular & JavaScript Development Jeeva A is an experienced Front-End Developer and UI Engineer with over 10 years of professional experience in designing and developing scalable, responsive, and user-focused web applications. He has previously served as a Technical Team Lead at GDKN Technologies, where he led front-end architecture for enterprise-grade SaaS platforms such as eNotary On Call and DocVoice. His technical expertise spans Angular, React, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, SCSS, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, and modern UI/UX practices. He is proficient in building component-driven architectures, delivering multilingual and cross-platform interfaces, and applying industry-standard coding practices to improve performance, accessibility, and user experience. Earlier in his career at Amphisoft Technologies, Jeeva contributed extensively as a UI Designer, creating responsive LMS interfaces and pixel-perfect web layouts. His strong understanding of design tools such as Figma and Adobe Photoshop, combined with hands-on expertise in front-end engineering, enables him to craft visually appealing and functionally robust user interfaces. He holds an M.E degree. in Computer Science and is passionate about teaching, mentoring, and simplifying technical concepts for learners. His teaching interests include Web Development, Angular Framework, UI/UX Fundamentals, Responsive Design, and Front-End Architecture. Mr.R.Vasanth Kumar Ph.D., D.O.J : 01.08.2025 Areas of Specialization Digital Signal Processing (DSP),Audio Codec Processing ,Algorithm Development, Porting and Testing of DSP Algorithms, Python-based Tools Development, Automation Framework Development. Mr. R. Vasantha Kumar has been serving as a Staff Engineer at Borqs Technologies Inc., Bangalore, since March 2024. With over 20 years of experience in the Digital Signal Processing domain, he specializes in audio codec processing, algorithm development, porting, testing, Python-based tools development, and automation. He holds a B.E. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai. Throughout his career, he has contributed to multiple organizations across India and has successfully led teams on various projects for global clients. He also received the top prize in a technical symposium for his innovative tool titled Development of Simulink Models Using Python. Beyond his professional pursuits, Mr. Vasantha Kumar is passionate about writing poems and fiction, having published more than 300 eBooks on Amazon Kindle. His other interests include cooking, trekking, singing, and public speaking. Admission Enquiry 2025 Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. programs are created by skilled content developers who interact closely with Industry experts and faculty to understand the gaps and upgrade each student to their highest potential.The sessions are structured in such a way that the participation of the students is given as much importance as the participation of the facilitator in each session. Adult Learning methodologies are incorporated to ensure the training truly creates an impact among the students.
